news.t: UPDATE -- Tidal Financial Group and Defiance ETFs Announce Reverse Stock Splits for Select ETFs
Tidal Financial Group and Defiance ETFs Announce Reverse Stock Splits for Select ETFs
Defiance Launches IONX: 2X Leveraged ETF for IonQ

holdings.infoBox: IONX is an equity ETF with a total of 13 individual holdings. The top holdings are US DOLLARS stock at 78.68%, IONQ INC SWAP L-CS at 33.30%, IONQ INC SWAP JNST-L at 29.59%, IONQ INC.-SWAP-MSCS-L at 26.38%, and IONQ INC SWAP CANTOR at 26.33%.

overview.description: The Defiance Daily Target 2X Long IONQ ETF (IONX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund seeks to deliver 2x leveraged exposure to the daily share price movement of IonQ, Inc. (IONQ), less fees and expenses, through derivatives like swap agreements IONX was launched on Mar 11, 2025 and is issued by Defiance.
